title: Nia's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Follow little Nia as she experiences different emotions throughout her day, each beautifully represented by vibrant colors that help young children understand and identify their own feelings.

pages.text: This is Nia. Nia has many feelings every day.

illustration.description: A cheerful girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing in a swirling rainbow of soft pastel colors representing various emotions floating around her
illustration.alt: Nia surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Nia is happy, she feels bright yellow sunshine inside.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes laughing joyfully against a background of brilliant yellow sunshine rays and golden sparkles
illustration.alt: Happy Nia with yellow sunshine background

pages.text: When Nia is sad, she feels like blue raindrops falling.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes looking down sadly as gentle blue raindrops fall around her in a soft blue misty background
illustration.alt: Sad Nia with blue rain falling

pages.text: When Nia is angry, she feels hot red swirls spinning fast.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes with a frustrated expression surrounded by bold red angry swirls and jagged patterns
illustration.alt: Angry Nia with red swirls around her

pages.text: When Nia is calm, she feels soft green like gentle leaves.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes sitting peacefully in a serene green background with floating gentle leaf shapes and calm waves
illustration.alt: Calm Nia in peaceful green setting

pages.text: All feelings are okay. Nia's heart holds every color.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes smiling warmly with her hands on her heart, surrounded by a beautiful blend of yellow, blue, red, and green colors flowing harmoniously
illustration.alt: Nia embracing all her colorful emotions

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color does Nia feel when she is happy?
questions.explanation: When Nia is happy, she feels bright yellow sunshine inside!

questions.question: What does Nia feel when she is sad?
questions.explanation: When Nia is sad, she feels like blue raindrops falling.

questions.question: Are all of Nia's feelings okay?
questions.explanation: Yes! All feelings are okay. Nia's heart holds every color.
